title: Triple Killer Accidentally Shows Police Her Horrifying Secret

beats.description: Dramatic opening showing police raid, burned vehicle, and officers reacting to horrific discoveries.
Initial 911 calls from Kane reporting missing property and requesting a welfare check for his grandmother.
Mike visits the station, explains complex family dynamics, and warns police about Kane's potential danger.
First welfare check reveals an empty, cluttered house; suspicious texts and canceled calls raise police suspicion.
Passerby reports a fire; officers discover a burned, flipped vehicle containing three severely charred bodies.
Autopsy confirms identities; Kane's domestic violence history and wife's disturbing recording surface.
Detectives deliver death notifications to relatives; Cassandra is identified as a key person of interest.
Cassandra's 911 call and police visit expose contradictions via surveillance footage and Walmart receipts.
Search warrant executed at Cassandra's home reveals hidden basement items; phone ping locates her in Mississippi.
Motel confrontation where detectives press Cassandra, followed by Kane voluntarily walking into a police station.
Kane's voluntary interview where his alibi is systematically debunked, leading to his arrest.
Cassandra's confession at her parents' house details the cover-up and directly implicates Kane.
Kane's final interrogation, formal charges filed, and case summary detailing the investigation's conclusion.
